name: Marigold Boa
alt_names: ボア・マリーゴールド
description:
__Affiliations:__ Kuja, Kuja Pirates
__Occupations:__ Pirate, Ruler of Amazon Lily
__Height:__ 432 cm (14'2")

Boa Marigold is one of the three Gorgon sisters that rule over Amazon Lily, and one of the second-in commands of the Kuja Pirates. She and her sisters are called the Gorgon sisters for supposedly heroically slaying a monster called the Gorgon. She is the younger sister of Boa Hancock and Boa Sandersonia.

~!Prior to being a ruler of Amazon Lily she was a slave of the Celestial Dragons. On her back, covered by her cape and her long hair, is a mark of slavery branded on her by their previous Celestial Dragon masters. It resembles a hoof mark and is a sign that means that she is "less than human" since she was a slave. Her sisters share this mark as well on their backs.!~
